name: MagicSlide MCP Server — AI PowerPoint Generator
what_it_does: MCP server for MagicSlide — generates professional PowerPoint presentations from text prompts, YouTube videos, or structured content. Enables AI agents to create presentation decks automatically from various input sources, outputting ready-to-use .pptx files.
use_cases: Generating presentation decks from meeting notes or research documents by productivity agents
Converting YouTube video content into slide presentations for content repurposing agents
Creating sales or pitch decks from structured business data by automation agents
Automating presentation creation workflows for content teams
not_for: Highly custom brand-compliant presentations requiring precise design control
Large-scale presentation generation with custom templates
Collaborative presentation editing (generation focus, not editing)
best_when: A user or team needs to quickly create PowerPoint presentations from content they have — transforming text, videos, or notes into formatted slide decks without manual PowerPoint work.
avoid_when: You need pixel-perfect branded presentations. AI-generated slides are a good starting point but typically require human review and polish before client-facing use.

auth.notes: MagicSlide API key required. Remote presentation generation service. Output files are .pptx format.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pro and Business tiers for higher generation limits
pricing.notes: Free tier available with limits. Paid tiers for production use. Per-generation pricing model.

known_agent_gotchas: Generation latency (5-30s) requires async handling in agent workflows
Input content passes through MagicSlide servers — avoid proprietary or confidential content
YouTube URL processing requires publicly accessible videos
Generated slides quality varies — human review recommended before client use
Rate limits on free tier may block agents with high generation volume
agent_readiness.security_notes: Content sent to MagicSlide for processing — avoid confidential documents. Generated files are .pptx for local download. API key security required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Source content processed by MagicSlide servers. Don't send confidential documents. Generated .pptx output. API key protection.
